what_worked_text: The AI-drafted proposal template reduced my writing time from about 2.5 hours to under 45 minutes per proposal. I now send two proposals per week instead of one because the barrier is so much lower.
what_surprised_text: Clients actually asked for more personalization than I expected — I have to hand-edit the tone section every time, which takes about 15 minutes. The structure is solid but the voice needs my touch.
what_owner_would_change_text: I would add a short personalization checklist right after the template so I don't forget to customize the opening paragraph and the client-specific pain points section before sending.
